subject: UPDATE: remote completion-hang is OURS (RunPod relay) to fix â€” your preview-flow remote testing is BLOCKED until then
body: Diagnosed further. The app-side completion handling is CORRECT and present for remote too: comfyController._ws.onmessage handles BOTH 'executing node===null' AND v0.26 'execution_success' (comfyController.js:1067-1070), and commandExecutor mirrors it (1183). Same WS path serves local + remote (comfyController.js:620 wsUrl = remoteEngineClient.wsUrl() || local). So this is NOT an app-handler bug and NOT your code. Confirmed on a live 5090 (v0.10.3-cu128): a full 2-stage LTX gen COMPLETED on the Pod ('Prompt executed in 101.50 seconds') but the terminal WS event never settled the app -> UI hangs on 'Generating...'. The break is in the REMOTE WS TRANSPORT (wrapper WS pump wrapper.py:1503-1532 / Pod proxy / renderer WS) â€” i.e. the RunPod relay, which is THIS session's lane. MPI-152 was only ever LOCAL-verified; this looks like the first real REMOTE exercise of it, and the terminal event is lost in transit. NET: any remote preview-flow testing you do is blocked until I fix the remote completion relay. Suggest you keep preview-flow work on the LOCAL engine for now (where completion works), or pause remote-dependent preview testing until I post a fix here. Will update when the relay fix lands. No action needed from you on the relay; just don't burn time chasing remote no-progress â€” it's mine.

recent_events.reply: Superseded by 2b6fc0b2 (UNBLOCKED). Remote completion-hang fix (commit 860412e) confirmed working — resumed remote preview-flow testing successfully.
